**🎛️ VOZZ RICH // ELECTRONIC PRESS KIT**  
*Blending Detroit grit, Latin heat, and big-room energy*

---

### **🌟 ARTIST PROFILE**  
**Genre:** Hybrid House (Electronic • Dance • Techno • Salsa Fusion)  
**Roots:** Mexican-American | California-raised  
**Signature Sound:** High-octane grooves meet Latin percussion and Detroit-inspired synthscapes. Pioneers "melodic club propulsion" with dynamic vocal chops and genre-blurring rhythms.

---

### **📀 NOTABLE RELEASES**  
**🔥 Hot Tracks:**  
- *"Breathless" w/ L25* (July 2024) – 275k+ Spotify streams  
- *"Butterflies" Remix* (Artsychoke collab) – Beatport Top 20 peak  
- *"Dance All Night" Remix* (Jaytor collab) – Summer 2024 festival staple  

**🆕 Upcoming Projects:**  
- *"House Ablaze"* (Dec 2024) – Tribal-tech fusion single  
- *"Mi Corazon Batalla"* (Aug 2024) – Salsa-meets-techno anthem  
- *"Sofi Disco" Remix* (PAUL PARKER collab – Oct 2024)  

---

### **📊 PLATFORM IMPACT**  
**Spotify:**  
- 4,109 followers | Peak monthly listeners: **37,764** (Nov 2024)  
- Consistent Top 5% engagement in Electronic playlists  

**Social Growth:**  
- 📈 4,875 Instagram followers  
- 🎧 729 Last.fm listeners (+19% Q4 2024)  

---

**Viral Momentum:**  
- 23% MoM growth in Shazam tags for *"Don’t Want It to End"* (PYM Remix)  

---

**Studio Focus:**  
- New EP in development (*Q3 2025*) – Experimental Latin-house fusion  
- Collabs with rising techno producers (TBA)  

**Live Expansion:**  
- Booking West Coast club residencies (LA/SF)
